Interface TeamMember

public interface TeamMember
Represents a single member within a Team.

Implementations returned by a TeamsService are read-only snapshots. To modify membership data, use the mutation methods on TeamsService directly.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Instant
    getJoinedAt()
    Returns the instant at which this player joined the team.
    UUID
    getPlayerUUID()
    Returns the UUID of the player this membership belongs to.
    TeamRole
    getRole()
    Returns the role this member currently holds within the team.

  • Method Details

    • getPlayerUUID

      UUID getPlayerUUID()
      Returns the UUID of the player this membership belongs to.
      Returns:
      the player's UUID; never null

    • getRole

      TeamRole getRole()
      Returns the role this member currently holds within the team.
      Returns:
      the member's TeamRole; never null

    • getJoinedAt

      Instant getJoinedAt()
      Returns the instant at which this player joined the team.

      If the backing implementation does not track join times, this method may return Instant.EPOCH as a sentinel value.

      Returns:
      the join timestamp; never null
